name: Tornadus (Therian)
description: The Cyclone Pokémon. Tornadus expels massive energy from its tail, causing severe storms. Its power is great enough to blow houses away.

abilities.name: Regenerator
abilities.description: Once per long rest, this Pokémon regains hit points equal to its level when it returns to its Pokéball.

forms.description: Tornadus's default form is Incarnate Forme. When given a Reveal Glass to hold, it can change to Therian Forme at will. In Incarnate Forme, its abilities are replaced with Prankster and Defiant.
